title: Search for missing UFO expert and Air Force Gen. William McCasland hindered by warm weather
description: The vastness of the search area, as well as the warm temperatures in Albuquerque, have complicated thermal drone search efforts in the investigation into McCasland's disappearance, the sheriff's office said.

title: Florida kayak fisherman gets spooked after seeing Elon Musk's SpaceX launch, thinks it's a glowing 'alien UFO' hovering above a motorway (possible nsfw content on page) [Strange]
Retired Air Force Major General William McCasland Disappears Mysteriously From Albuquerque Days After Trump Releases UFO Records
description: [»] Jump to Summary... Retired Air Force Major General William McCasland has been missing for 18 days, sparking concern and curiosity in Albuquerque, New Mexico. His disappearance comes at a time when UFO-related news has been in the spotlight, just days after President Donald Trump ordered the release of previously classified UFO records. Who Is [...]

title: Shocked drivers spot ‘glowing alien UFO’ hovering above Florida highway
description: A FLORIDA driver has captured startling photos showing an eerie orange object streaking over a busy highway. The massive object and its trail of light can be seen against the pitch black night sky, with commenters across the internet weighing in on what it is. Fisherman Brandon Barton captured the mysterious sight while driving home...
